description: iOS / iPadOS Metal profiling matrix. Targets the @elizaos/llama-cpp-capacitor build once the dylib lands (porting plan task #21). Excludes QJL until the MSL kernel is shipped. Profiles Eliza-1 on iOS Metal with supported KV-cache settings.

prompts.text: What is the capital of France?
Explain in three sentences why the sky is blue.
Write a 200-word story about a small robot who wants to learn to paint.
